prompt: Icon design, dark background. A small golden-amber glowing octopus creature seen from the front. Simple, bold silhouette. The most prominent features are TWO TALL STALKS rising from the top of its head, like snail eye stalks, each tipped with a round bright eye. It has eight prehensile tentacles. The creature is holding a single thin fiber in one tentacle, as if beginning to weave. Inner amber glow. NOT a snail — it has tentacles with suckers, not a foot. Warm golden-amber against black background.
